# Paste into GitHub → Settings → General → About (Description)
ClipClipper — find ranked clip moments in long YouTube videos. Local yt-dlp, Whisper, and LLM fusion (replay, audio, chapters) → clips.json; optional ffmpeg cuts. No watermarks or clip credits.

# Suggested topics (add in About → Topics)
youtube
python
whisper
yt-dlp
openai
gemini
ffmpeg
video-editing
llm
content-creation

# One-shot after: gh auth login
# gh repo edit DontHash/Optimized-AI-ShortsGenerator --description "ClipClipper — find ranked clip moments in long YouTube videos. Local yt-dlp, Whisper, and LLM fusion (replay, audio, chapters) → clips.json; optional ffmpeg cuts. No watermarks or clip credits." --add-topic youtube --add-topic python --add-topic whisper --add-topic yt-dlp --add-topic openai --add-topic gemini --add-topic ffmpeg --add-topic video-editing --add-topic llm --add-topic content-creation
